parameters.name: ReferenceCustomer
parameters.description: When provided, returns offers available for that customer

parameters.name: Upgrade
parameters.description: When true (with ReferenceCustomer or IdSubscription), returns only upgrade options

parameters.name: IdSubscription
parameters.description: Returns upgrade options for this subscription

parameters.name: IgnoreFeatures
parameters.description: When true, the Features array is omitted from the response

parameters.name: Pricing
parameters.description: When false, pricing fields are omitted from the response — makes the call faster

parameters.name: Html
parameters.description: When true (default), localized pricing fields are returned as HTML

parameters.name: Links
parameters.description: When false, the Links array is omitted from the response — makes the call faster (default true)

parameters.name: SizePage
parameters.description: Items per page. Use 0 to retrieve only the count
